name: Cascade with substrate matching
description: Tests that the agent matches substrates between components before cascading, since design() defaults differ across object types
prompt: Cascade a lowpass step-impedance filter with a microstrip line at 5 GHz. Both should share the same substrate and conductor. Show the combined S-parameters.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses pcbcascade to join the two components
Copies Substrate, Height, and Conductor from one component to the other before cascading
assertions.expected: Substrate assignment from one component to the other

assertions.description: Computes S-parameters on the cascaded result

name: Load coupler ports with lumped elements via pcbElement
description: Tests the pcbElement workflow: AnalysisPorts for external I/O, PortNumber for internal loads
prompt: I have a 4-port ratrace coupler at 5 GHz. I want to use ports 1 and 2 as my input/output and terminate ports 3 and 4 with 50-ohm resistors. Set this up and analyze the 2-port response.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses pcbElement to wrap the coupler
Sets PortNumber and PortValue for internal loads
Does not include the same port in both AnalysisPorts and PortNumber
assertions.expected: AnalysisPorts={1,2} and PortNumber={3,4} with no overlap

name: Export S-parameters to Touchstone file
description: Tests that the agent uses rfwrite correctly with frequency unit and format options
prompt: Compute S-parameters for a designed microstrip line from 1 to 10 GHz and export them as a Touchstone file in dB format with GHz frequency units.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB

assertions.expected: FrequencyUnit and Format options passed to rfwrite
